revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:縣神社]]
'''Agata Shrine''' (縣神社 or 県神社) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} located throughout {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. * {{ill|Agata Shrine (Ōamishirasato)|ja|complete=true|縣神社 (大網白里市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Ōamishirasato)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Ōamishirasato)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōamishirasato|en|Ōamishirasato|qid=Q1203251|lt=Ōamishirasato, Chiba|1=Ōamishirasato}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Agata Shrine (Gifu)|ja|complete=true|縣神社 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Gifu)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Gifu)|1=Agata Shrine (Gifu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11608141}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|qid=Q45798|lt=Gifu, Gifu|1=Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Agata Shrine (Gero City)|ja|complete=true|縣神社 (下呂市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Gero City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Gero City)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Gero, Gifu|en|Gero, Gifu|qid=Q819639|lt=Gero, Gifu|1=Gero, Gifu}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Agata Shrine (Yokkaichi)|ja|縣神社 (四日市市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Yokkaichi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Yokkaichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500704}} - Located in {{ill|Yokkaichi|en|Yokkaichi|qid=Q26410|lt=Yokkaichi|1=Yokkaichi}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Usunono Shrine|ja|complete=true|宇須乃野神社|lt=Agata Shrine (Ise)|lt_ja=県神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usunono Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usunono Shrine|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|qid=Q328067|lt=Ise, Mie|1=Ise, Mie}}, Mie Prefecture. A {{ill|subordinate shrine|ja|末社|lt=Massha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|4=zh|5=攝末社|6=es|7=Setsumatsusha|8=fr|9=Setsumatsusha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyōke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Gekū). * {{ill|Agata Shrine (Uji)|ja|complete=true|縣神社 (宇治市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Uji)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Uji)|1=Agata Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} - Located in {{ill|Uji|en|Uji|qid=Q326956|lt=Uji, Kyoto|1=Uji}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Agata Shrine (Izumo)|ja|縣神社 (出雲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Izumo)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agata Shrine (Izumo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500707}} - Located in {{ill|Izumo, Shimane|en|Izumo, Shimane|qid=Q825166|lt=Izumo, Shimane|1=Izumo, Shimane}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}. {{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|縣神社|version=101733825|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:縣神社]]
